## Description

Brief description of the changes and why they were made.

Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance improvement

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them.

```bash
pytest Tests/ -v --cov=.
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (Black, isort, flake8)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have added docstrings and type hints where applicable
- [ ] No sensitive data (IPs, API keys, scan outputs) is included
